candidates.why: Direct revenue line with populated values; more specific and preferable to header/subtotal rows like 'Revenues' or 'Revenue from Business Activities - Total'.
Revenue subtotal matching the same values, useful as fallback if primary label changes across years.

variables.notes: Used specific revenue line first, with matching total as fallback priority label. Do not sum.

candidates.why: Best direct-production cost measure because it excludes depreciation, which should be excluded from COGS when a cleaner direct cost line exists.
Broad COGS-style line but includes depreciation, so less preferred than the excluding-depreciation version.

variables.notes: Preferred the most granular direct cost row excluding depreciation over subtotal/including-D&A alternatives.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and semantically best match for overhead; populated across years. Per hierarchy, select only this row when explicit SG&A exists.
Component of SG&A but less complete than the explicit SG&A line because the total/ex-R&D row captures broader overhead.
Too broad and includes COGS; not suitable when explicit SG&A exists.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|misclassified. Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row. It already states exclusion of R&D, so no separate R&D row is added here.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is not an R&D expense row; it explicitly excludes R&D, so it does not match XRD.

variables.notes: No dedicated research/development expense line is present in the income statement preview. The only candidate explicitly excludes R&D, so XRD is mapped to empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most specific recurring interest expense line and preferable to totals/net finance rows or EBIT/EBITDA measures.
Also a direct recurring interest line with same values; good fallback if label changes across years.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring interest-expense labels and avoided net finance totals because underlying recurring interest components are available. Output as priority list, not sum.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it is explicitly attributable to parent shareholders and therefore excludes minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner/parent equity line and suitable fallback if primary label changes.
Likely same owner equity amount here, but less explicit than parent-attributable labels.
Also matches common/parent equity and can serve as fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with minority interest. Output as priority list for label variation across years.

candidates.why: Direct non-controlling interest equity line; best match for MIB if populated in any year.
Alternative minority-interest label and useful fallback if naming changes.

variables.notes: Direct minority-interest labels exist, though values appear blank in preview. Per instructions, presence of row means it has value in at least one year, so mapped as priority list.
